ocr_findings.description: Answer labels '解答 2-3' through '解答 2-8' and their numbered answer letters (エ, エ, エ, イ, イ, ア) are all correctly captured. Inline choice explanations (ア./イ./ウ./エ. sub-bullets) are also present.

reviewer_notes: Page is '出る順！過去問＆完全解説' answer-and-explanation section (p.73), providing written explanations for questions 2-3 through 2-8. There are no 4-choice ア/イ/ウ/エ question stems on this page — only answer keys and prose explanations. Per the brief, the 'exam' label applies to pages with numbered Q + 4 choices in ア/イ/ウ/エ format. This page contains only solution explanations, making 'content' a more accurate label. Disagreeing with existing 'exam' classification.
